case_title: SOFI LENDING CORP. VS. JORGE VILLATORO BARDALES ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT BARDALES, JORGE VILLATORO ORDER SETTING HEARING FOR SEP-01-2021 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON SEP-01-2021 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JORGE BARDALES' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE, BUT WAIVES APPLICANT'S FIRST APPEARANCE FEE OWED TO THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
